messages.content:
Explain XSS vulnerabilities in professional terms.

The Chaty WordPress plugin before 2.8.3 and Chaty Pro WordPress plugin before 2.8.2 do not sanitise and escape the search parameter before outputting it back in the admin dashboard, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting

Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities enable attackers to inject malicious scripts into web pages viewed by other users. In the context of a reflected XSS vulnerability, the malicious script is reflected off a web server and executed in the victim's browser, potentially compromising user data and account integrity.
